name: stackra/api-sdk
purpose: Attribute-driven typed SDK kernel — Saloon connector, #[AsSdkResource] discovery, typed exception hierarchy, correlation propagation, retry middleware, and mock support.
capabilities: ApiFake for tests bound via config('sdk.api.fake')
Base classes for Requests + Resources + Data DTOs
when_to_use: Every per-service umbrella SDK (identity-sdk, platform-sdk, billing-sdk, ...) extends this shared kernel.
when_not_to_use: For a specific service surface, pair the umbrella sibling (stackra/identity-sdk, /platform-sdk, ...) instead.
